name: Aberdeen Group at DubTech '96 — Khaleej Times Photo Caption
description: A newspaper photograph caption from the Khaleej Times (Dubai, 23 March 1996) documenting Aberdeen Group's attendance at DubTech '96, a technology trade show in Dubai. The caption records a reception at the Holiday Inn Crowne Plaza attended by Sultan bin Sulayem (chairman of Dubai Ports Authority and Jebel Ali Free Zone Authority) alongside Aberdeen Group representatives Peter Kastner, John Logan, James Hurley, and Ali Kamali.
